states.name: Kemek
states.title: Soul of Retribution
states.description: Old elven legends speak of the Kemek, a kind of spirit that can be called to bring justice for a perceived crime. The Kemek are the driving plots of numerous stories, reassuring young elves that crimes can always be punished, but also warning of the consequences of wronging others.

states.name: Kemek
states.title: Soul of Retribution
states.description: To call a Kemek, the elves say, one must draw a circle in their own blood. They sit inside the circle with a gift and state their grievance over and over until the Kemek appears. The Kemek looks over the gift, and judges its worth in respect to the justice expected of them. If they accept, they bring justice. If they refuse, they instead slay the summoner.
